context: A transitional year reflecting Vietnam-era upheaval. Simon & Garfunkel's 'Bridge Over Troubled Water' offered comfort, Edwin Starr's 'War' became an anti-war anthem, and The Beatles released their final single. Motown soul remained a powerful cultural force.

tracks.title: (They Long to Be) Close to You
Raindrops Keep Fallin' on My Head
Ball of Confusion (That's What the World Is Today)
